languages.text: {n}Огромные врата явно созданы не людскими руками. Их створки украшены множеством мерцающих сигилов. Искусность, с которой вырезаны ксеносские письмена, вызывает одновременно изумление и гадливость.{/n}

{n}An enormous gate clearly wrought by inhuman hands. The doors are emblazoned with a multitude of shimmering sigils. The skill evident in the carved xenos inscriptions both awes and disgusts you.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Огромные врата явно созданы не людскими руками. Их створки украшены множеством мерцающих сигилов. Искусность, с которой вырезаны ксеносские письмена, вызывает одновременно изумление и гадливость.{/n}

{n}An enormous gate clearly wrought by inhuman hands. The doors are emblazoned with a multitude of shimmering sigils. The skill evident in the carved xenos inscriptions both awes and disgusts you.{/n}

languages.text: {n}非人間の手によって作られた巨大な門。扉には、輝きを放つ多数の紋章が描かれている。刻まれた異形の文字には、その技術の高さに畏怖と嫌悪感を感じる。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}An enormous gate clearly wrought by inhuman hands. The doors are emblazoned with a multitude of shimmering sigils. The skill evident in the carved xenos inscriptions both awes and disgusts you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}非人間の手によって作られた巨大な門。扉には、輝きを放つ多数の紋章が描かれている。刻まれた異形の文字には、その技術の高さに畏怖と嫌悪感を感じる。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Una enorme puerta, claramente obra de manos no humanas. Las hojas están grabadas con numerosos sellos brillantes. La artesanía de las inscripciones xenos es tan impresionante como repulsiva.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}An enormous gate clearly wrought by inhuman hands. The doors are emblazoned with a multitude of shimmering sigils. The skill evident in the carved xenos inscriptions both awes and disgusts you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Una enorme puerta, claramente obra de manos no humanas. Las hojas están grabadas con numerosos sellos brillantes. La artesanía de las inscripciones xenos es tan impresionante como repulsiva.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Ein riesiges, eindeutig von nicht-menschlichen Händen erbautes Tor. Die Türen sind mit zahllosen schimmernden Siegeln versehen. Die Kunstfertigkeit der Xenos-Inschriften ist gleichermaßen bemerkenswert wie abstoßend.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}An enormous gate clearly wrought by inhuman hands. The doors are emblazoned with a multitude of shimmering sigils. The skill evident in the carved xenos inscriptions both awes and disgusts you.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Un gigantesque portail se dresse devant vous, manifestement conçu par des mains non-humaines. Les portes sont ornées d'innombrables sceaux scintillants. Les gravures xénos sont d'excellente facture, suscitant à la fois votre admiration et votre dégoût.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}An enormous gate clearly wrought by inhuman hands. The doors are emblazoned with a multitude of shimmering sigils. The skill evident in the carved xenos inscriptions both awes and disgusts you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Un gigantesque portail se dresse devant vous, manifestement conçu par des mains non-humaines. Les portes sont ornées d'innombrables sceaux scintillants. Les gravures xénos sont d'excellente facture, suscitant à la fois votre admiration et votre dégoût.{/n}

languages.text: {n}这是一扇显然由非人之手铸造的巨大门扉，门板上蚀刻着无数闪烁的符文。这些异形文字展现出的雕刻技艺既令你心生敬畏，又让你感到厌恶。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}An enormous gate clearly wrought by inhuman hands. The doors are emblazoned with a multitude of shimmering sigils. The skill evident in the carved xenos inscriptions both awes and disgusts you.{/n}

languages.text: {n}İnsan olmayan ellerden çıktığı belli olan devasa bir kapı. Çok sayıda parıldayan mühürle donatılmış. Oyulmuş zeno yazıtlarındaki bariz ustalık seni hem hayran bırakıyor hem de tiksindiriyor.{/n}
